frames.text: CursorEditWindowGit repository link 88•Tue Jun 16 8:00PMV New Agent• Automations8 CustomizeWorkshacedbut tell me something can we create the same desktop app ouwleft?For faster iteration during development:bun tauri dev --features metalImportant caveats for your setup1. Don't build on the ExFAT external drive - clone or copy the repo to internal SSD (~/dev/screenpipe).ExFAT breaks git, Rust target/ , and symlinks. Keep data on the external drive via SCREENPIPE_DATA_DIR.2. First build takes 30-60
